programs.title: Going Places With Ernie Dingo
programs.desc: Ernie meets a sculptor creating wildlife out of scrap metal and gets a tour of the region with a passionate local. Rae cruises the Clarence River with a Yaegl artist to learn how it inspires her work.

programs.title: True Colours
programs.desc: Lying on a bed in the health clinic, Brendan is being rehydrated via a drip. Bereft, Viv hovers. Nick brings the focus back to the investigation, and Brendan tells them he was with Keithy all night.

programs.title: Mad Max Beyond The Thunderdome
programs.desc: Set in a lawless, post-apocalyptic wilderness. To retrieve his camel train, hero Max enters the seedy, savage, rough-hewn precincts of Bartertown. Forced to fight for his possessions, he breaks the only rule of the city and is banished. In the desert, he is rescued by a tribe of feral children who see him as a prophesied saviour.

programs.title: This Is Ballroom
programs.desc: In Rio, LGBTQ+ youth of color recreate Ballroom culture on their own terms.

programs.title: Big Backyard Quiz
programs.desc: Our teams will sing some songs, share a meal or two and get into a heated round of Tic-Tac-Toe as they battle it out for the coveted Golden Tongs.

programs.title: NITV On the Road: Mbantua
programs.desc: A weekend of Culture and Music in Central Australia.
